# Horn-call of Buckland ◆

> [!note] 📖 Attachment · Cost: **1** · Lore

*Skill.*

---

Attach to a (Lore) or **_Hobbit_** hero.
**Response**: After you engage an enemy that shares a **_Trait_** with an enemy in the victory display, exhaust Horn-call of Buckland to ready attached hero. Then, that enemy gets −1 ATK and −1 DEF until the end of the round.

---

> *At that moment, among the trees nearby, a horn rang out. It rent the night like fire on a hill-top.*
> —The Fellowship of the Ring

**Pack:** [[ALeP - The Aldburg Plot]] #9
